meta.title: Jorge Arce — Chapter 01
meta.description: A surgeon known for the cases others step away from. A monograph in ten chapters — Dr. Jorge Arce, South Bay, California.

notes:
Trained in Colombia,
built in California —
27 years of practice

Founder — Dental Implants
Center of South Bay (2007)

sections.statement: A surgeon known for the cases others step away from — and the quiet, unhurried precision it takes to give them back their lives.

cols.text: Dr. Arce trained in Colombia, then devoted his career entirely to oral & maxillofacial surgery and dental implantology.
He built his life's work in California — the procedures most surgeons refer out: complex extractions, reconstruction, full-arch cases.
Difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back. In 2007 he founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay on it.

sections.title: The work of a career spent on the difficult cases.

rows.d: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction, planned and placed with precision.
Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.
The difficult extractions and surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Long-term care that protects the work of a restored smile.
Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, and bone.
Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions.

sections.title: The man behind the work.
paras: Jorge grew up in Colombia, the son of a family that valued precision and patience long before he ever held a scalpel. Medicine was not a career choice so much as a calling — a way to use his hands to give something back.
He moved to California to specialize, and never left. Over twenty-seven years he built a practice on a single, unglamorous principle: take the time the case actually needs.

Outside the operating room he is a father, a mentor to younger surgeons, and a quiet student of his craft — still reading, still refining, still treating every patient as the person they are before the procedure they need.

cards.q: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.
When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
"The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family."
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.
"I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows."
I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.
Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. He sends my patients back with a full report every time.
Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner. I recommend Dr. Arce to everyone I know.
